use_cases: Replacing the default browser cursor with a smooth, animated custom cursor for enhanced UX
Creating a distinctive brand experience on portfolio and showcase websites
Adding interactive cursor effects to creative landing pages and product demos
Implementing cursor-based visual feedback with visibility toggle on mouse enter/leave
Providing smooth cursor tracking with eased interpolation for polished interactions
ai_summary: A smooth-animated custom cursor component that replaces the default browser pointer with a fluid, eased tracking effect. The cursor follows mouse movement with a 0.2 interpolation factor creating a soft, lagging motion. It features visibility toggling on mouse enter/leave events within its container. This is a lightweight, self-contained cursor solution ideal for creative portfolios, SaaS landing pages, and any website looking to add a unique interactive touch without heavy dependencies.
